$comment: Skills the hero-vibe-kit workflow references. The `process` core skills are bundled under templates/skills/ and installed by init/update into .claude/skills/ — most are a curated, lightly trimmed MIT-licensed copy from obra/superpowers, while phase-handoff is authored by hero-vibe-kit (attribution: templates/skills/NOTICE). Design/taste skills are NOT bundled — they are referenced here and (optionally, with consent) installed via the `skills` CLI from their ORIGINAL sources. See docs: TEAM_ROSTER / AGENCY_WORKFLOW.

process.license: MIT for obra/superpowers skills; hero-vibe-kit authored for phase-handoff
process.description: Core process skills the workflow invokes by name. Bundled under templates/skills/ and installed into .claude/skills/ by init/update; most are a curated, lightly trimmed copy of obra/superpowers, and phase-handoff is authored by hero-vibe-kit (attribution in templates/skills/NOTICE). The workflow still runs without them (gates/hooks/router intact) but loses skill-guided depth.

selection.updatePolicy: refresh selected skills only; preserve existing unselected and user-added skill directories

skills.name: phase-handoff
skills.description: Loop executor at real phase boundaries — writes handoff artifact, checkpoints session.json (phase/resumePath/nextAction), and outputs the next-phase prompt. Invoke at every Standard/Full boundary; optional for Tiny/Small.

brand.description: Brand/identity skill. Use once per product/brand.

design-direction.description: Visual-direction taste systems. Pick EXACTLY ONE per project (DESIGN_STANDARDS §3).

design-tools.description: Complementary design tools — install as needed (not mutually exclusive).
